14

Entrées
Korean Barbecue Bowl (GFM)
-
21

Mac and Cheese Bowl (VM)
-
18
Pasta shells tossed in rich creamy sauce, topped with your choice of:
Pulled pork and tangy BBQ sauce
Grilled chicken, Buffalo sauce, buttermilk ranch
Brisket, pickled jalapeños, jalapeño crema +2
BBQ Plate (GFM)
-
Choice of 8oz of pulled pork, smoked quarter chicken, half rack of ribs, or sliced brisket. Served with one side of your choice:
Pork – 18
Chicken – 18
Ribs – 21
Brisket – 26
(Add a brioche bun for 3)
Shrimp and Pepper Pasta (VM)
-
24
Pan-roasted shrimp with fire-roasted red pepper cream sauce, tossed with parmesan broccoli and penne pasta
Brisket Tacos
-
16
Three soft flour tortillas stuffed with our signature coffee-rubbed smoked brisket, white onion, fresh cilantro, a lime wedge, and jalapeño crema. Served with one side
Southern Fried Chicken Salad (GFM) (VM)
-
19
Chicken tenders, roasted corn, cherry tomato, cheddar jack cheese, crispy fried tortilla strips. Vegetarian option – 13
Chicken Strip Basket (GFM)
-
20
Breaded and fried chicken strips served with one side and buttermilk ranch dressing. Buffalo-style +2

12
House-baked brownie covered in pure maple syrup icing and crunchy bacon pieces

15
Old-fashioned bread pudding with a bourbon twist. Drowned in a bourbon butter cream sauce and topped with whipped cream
